LanguageData.FCP_Quest_FeralGhoulInfestation.questDes: questDescription->[asker_nameFull] of [asker_faction_name] reports: "We've got a serious problem - a pack of feral ghouls has taken over [location]. They've been attacking any scavengers who get too close. The place likely has valuable pre-war salvage, but nobody's getting in while those ferals are nesting there. Clear them out and you can keep whatever you find inside."

questDescription->Message from [asker_faction_name]: "Intelligence suggests a large group of feral ghouls has made a nest in [location]. These mindless creatures are a threat to everyone in the region. [asker_nameFull] is offering payment and salvage rights to anyone who can eliminate the infestation."

questDescription->[asker_nameFull] needs help: "Ferals have overrun [location] - must be at least a dozen of them. They're aggressive, mindless, and getting bolder. Someone needs to put them down before they start raiding settlements. Fair warning: these aren't your typical ghouls - they're completely feral and will attack on sight."
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_FeralGhoulInfestation.root.nod: The feral ghouls have dispersed from the area.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_GlowingOneContainment.questDes: questDescription->[asker_nameFull] transmits an urgent message: "We've located an extremely dangerous glowing one - a ghoul so irradiated it's practically a walking reactor. Unlike the feral ones, this specimen shows signs of intelligence. We need it captured alive for research, but elimination is acceptable if necessary. WARNING: The radiation it emits can kill in minutes. Bring containment equipment for maximum reward."

questDescription->Priority alert from [asker_faction_name]: "Anomalous entity detected - a glowing one with radiation levels off the charts but retaining some cognitive function. [asker_nameFull] reports: 'This specimen could be invaluable for research if captured alive. We're offering full payment for live containment, partial payment for elimination. Your choice on approach.'"

questDescription->[asker_nameFull] requests immediate assistance: "A highly radioactive glowing one has been spotted near [location]. This one isn't completely feral - it might be possible to capture it. The entity must be neutralized or captured. If you have anomaly containment protocols, this is the time to use them. Full bounty for live capture, half payment if killed."
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_GlowingOneContainment.root.nod: The glowing one threat has been neutralized.
The glowing one has moved to another location.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_GlowingOneElimination.questDes: questDescription->[asker_nameFull] transmits an urgent alert: "We've located an extremely dangerous glowing one - completely feral and emitting lethal radiation. It's killed everyone who's gotten close. This thing needs to be put down permanently. WARNING: It's in a permanent berserk state and cannot be reasoned with or captured. Lethal force only."

questDescription->Emergency broadcast from [asker_faction_name]: "Feral glowing one detected near [location]. This entity is beyond saving - it's mindless, hyper-aggressive, and radiating at deadly levels. [asker_nameFull] is offering substantial payment for its elimination. Do not attempt containment - it will kill you."

questDescription->[asker_nameFull] requests immediate extermination: "A berserk glowing one is terrorizing [location]. Two containment teams went in - none came out. This isn't a capture mission anymore. Kill it before it kills more people. Heavy firepower recommended."
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_GlowingOneElimination.root.nod: The glowing one has moved to another location.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_NCR_Pawn_Rescue_Humanlike_Citi: questDescription->[prisoner_nameDef] has been captured by enemy forces. It's up to you to rescue them.
You have defeated the prisoner camp!\n\nThe payment from [asker_faction_name] has arrived.

These colonists participated in the victory for the quest [resolvedQuestName]. [asker_definite] wants to know who should receive the [royalFavorReward_amount] [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] for this service.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_NCR_Pawn_Rescue_Humanlike_Sold: questDescription->[prisoner_nameDef] has been captured by enemy forces. It's up to you to rescue them.
You have defeated the prisoner camp!\n\nThe payment from [asker_faction_name] has arrived.

These colonists participated in the victory for the quest [resolvedQuestName]. [asker_definite] wants to know who should receive the [royalFavorReward_amount] [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] for this service.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_SettlementRaidDefense.questDes: questDescription->Emergency transmission from [asker_nameFull], [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name]: "We've received urgent intelligence that raiders are planning a coordinated assault on one of our [settlement]s. The settlers there are defenseless - mostly farmers, traders, and families just trying to survive in the wasteland. We need experienced fighters to reach the settlement and help defend it before the attack begins."
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_SettlementRaidDefense.root.nod: The raider warband has arrived at the settlement perimeter! Shots fired - the attack has begun!
The wasteland scum have already begun their assault! The settlement's defenders are fighting for their lives - get in there and help them drive off these raiders!
The raiders have been driven off and the settlement stands! The grateful survivors are pooling together what they can spare as payment for your heroic defense of their home.

These colonists participated in the victory for the quest [resolvedQuestName]. [asker_definite] wants to know who should receive the [royalFavorReward_amount] [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] for this service.
The raiders have overwhelmed the settlement's defenses. Smoke rises from the ruins as the survivors flee into the wasteland. Your mission has failed.
Without assistance, the settlement fell to the raider assault. Another light in the wasteland has been extinguished. The quest [resolvedQuestName] has failed.
By leaving the settlement undefended, you've sealed its fate. The raiders have claimed another victory in the wasteland.
questDescription->A transmission from [asker_faction_name] has reached us through the static-filled airwaves. They've located a pre-war [facility] but can't get its ancient technology operational. The facility likely contains valuable pre-war tech, but it's currently occupied by hostiles. Clear the area and help restore this piece of old-world engineering to working order.

questDescription->Intelligence reports from [asker_faction_name] indicate they've discovered an intact pre-war [facility] in the wasteland. The complex still has power, but automated security systems and raiders have made it inaccessible. They need experienced wasteland operatives to secure the facility and bring its dormant systems back online.

questDescription->A priority message from [asker_faction_name]: "We've found something big - a [facility] from before the bombs fell. The place is a goldmine of old-world technology, but we can't crack the security protocols. Help us clear out the current occupants and reactivate this monument to pre-war innovation."

questDescription->Urgent communication from [asker_faction_name]: A [facility] dating back to the old world has been discovered, still largely intact after all these years. The potential technological salvage is enormous, but hostile forces have claimed it as their base. Eliminate the threat and help restore this relic of civilization to operational status.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_PawnRescueAnimal.questDescript: questDescription->A small irradiated creature has been captured by wasteland raiders and is being held in their camp. The local settlement is offering payment and a containment cage for its safe rescue - these creatures are valuable for research and companionship in the harsh wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_PawnRescueAnimal_Large.questDe: questDescription->A massive apex predator of the wasteland has been captured by heavily fortified raiders who plan to weaponize it against their enemies. This is an extremely dangerous creature, evolved to survive in the harshest post-nuclear conditions. Successfully rescue it and you'll receive state-of-the-art containment technology capable of holding such a formidable beast.

questDescription->The raiders have done the impossible - they've caged one of the wasteland's most feared predators. This alpha specimen represents years of evolutionary adaptation to radiation and environmental hazards. Its rescue will require significant force, but the reward includes advanced containment systems developed by pre-war military scientists.

questDescription->Intelligence reports indicate raiders have captured what may be the last of its species - a colossal wasteland behemoth. The scientific and tactical value of this creature cannot be overstated. Mount a full-scale rescue operation and claim the most advanced bio-containment system available in the post-apocalyptic world.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_PawnRescueAnimal_Medium.questD: questDescription->A medium-sized predator has been captured by well-armed raiders who plan to use it in their gladiatorial fights. This creature has adapted well to the irradiated wasteland and would make a valuable addition to any settlement. Rescue it and claim a reinforced containment system as your reward.

questDescription->Raiders have caged a dangerous but valuable wasteland predator, likely planning to sell it to the highest bidder. The local authorities want this creature rescued and properly contained before it falls into the wrong hands. A military-grade cage awaits successful mercenaries.

questDescription->A formidable wasteland hunter sits trapped in a raider camp, its natural ferocity slowly being broken by captivity. Liberation of this creature would not only be a merciful act but also earn you a professional-grade containment cage - perfect for housing dangerous specimens.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_PawnRescueAnimal_Small.questDe: questDescription->A small irradiated creature has been captured by wasteland raiders and is being held in their camp. The local settlement is offering payment and a containment cage for its safe rescue - these creatures are valuable for research and companionship in the harsh wasteland.

questDescription->Raiders have trapped a small wasteland animal for their sick entertainment. Help liberate this innocent creature from their makeshift prison, and you'll be rewarded with a proper cage to keep it safe from the dangers of the post-nuclear world.

questDescription->A harmless wasteland critter has fallen into the hands of ruthless raiders. The locals want it rescued before the raiders decide to make it their next meal. Your reward: a sturdy cage and the gratitude of those who still care about life in this desolate world.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_PawnRescueHumanlike.questDescr: questDescription->A desperate transmission from [asker_faction_name] has crackled through the radio static. One of their people, [prisoner_nameDef], has been captured by wasteland raiders and is being held in a fortified slave camp. The captors are known for their brutality, and time is running out. Mount a rescue operation to liberate this survivor before they become another casualty of the harsh wasteland.

questDescription->Intelligence from [asker_faction_name] reports that [prisoner_nameDef], a valued member of their community, has fallen into the hands of ruthless slavers. The raider camp is heavily defended, but the captive's knowledge of pre-war technology makes them too valuable to abandon. Infiltrate the compound and extract the prisoner before they're sold to the highest bidder.

questDescription->An urgent message from [asker_faction_name]: "[prisoner_nameDef] was taken during a supply run gone wrong. The raiders who captured them are part of a notorious slaving operation that's been terrorizing the wasteland. We can't leave one of our own to suffer in their hands. Break into their stronghold and bring [prisoner_nameDef] home."

questDescription->Emergency communication from [asker_faction_name]: A survivor named [prisoner_nameDef] has been enslaved by raiders after their caravan was ambushed. The captors are demanding an impossible ransom while subjecting their prisoner to unspeakable conditions. The only option is a direct assault on their fortified position. Free this innocent soul from their wasteland nightmare.

questDescription->Priority alert from [asker_faction_name]: [prisoner_nameDef], a skilled wasteland survivor, has been captured by a gang of violent raiders known for their slave trading operations. The prisoner's intimate knowledge of local settlements makes them both valuable and dangerous in enemy hands. Stage a rescue mission before this information can be extracted and used against innocent communities.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_PawnRescueHumanlike.root.nodes: You have defeated the prisoner camp!\n\nThe payment from [asker_faction_name] has arrived.

These colonists participated in the victory for the quest [resolvedQuestName]. [asker_definite] wants to know who should receive the [royalFavorReward_amount] [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] for this service.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_SettlementRaidDefense.questDes: questDescription->Priority alert from [asker_nameFull] of [asker_faction_name]: "A notorious raider gang has been spotted moving toward [settlement]. The civilians there have no military training and limited weapons - they're sitting ducks. Intelligence suggests the raiders are after the settlement's food stores and fuel reserves. Time is critical - get there and fortify their defenses before the wasteland vultures arrive."

questDescription->Distress signal from [asker_faction_name]: "[asker_nameFull] here. We've lost contact with [settlement] after reports of raider activity in the area. Our scouts indicate a major assault is imminent - possibly within hours. The settlement houses dozens of innocent survivors who've built something decent in this godforsaken wasteland. They deserve a chance to keep what they've worked so hard to build."

questDescription->Urgent communication from [asker_nameFull], [asker_faction_leaderTitle]: "Raiders have been circling [settlement] like vultures for days, testing their defenses. The settlement's barely armed - they're peaceful folks who've managed to carve out a life in the ruins. Word is the raiders plan to hit them at dawn. These people took us in when we had nothing - now it's our turn to stand by them."

questDescription->Critical mission briefing from [asker_faction_name]: A heavily armed raider warband is converging on [settlement]. The target is strategically important - it sits on a major trade route and has clean water sources. If it falls, it'll embolden every raider gang in the region. [asker_nameFull] is personally requesting assistance: "Help us protect these people. In this wasteland, every functioning settlement is a beacon of hope."
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_USA_Pawn_Rescue_Humanlike_Citi: questDescription->[prisoner_nameDef] has been captured by enemy forces. It's up to you to rescue them.
You have defeated the prisoner camp!\n\nThe payment from [asker_faction_name] has arrived.

These soldiers participated in victorious rescue of [resolvedQuestName]. [asker_definite] wants to know who should receive the [royalFavorReward_amount] [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] for this service.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_USA_Pawn_Rescue_Humanlike_Sold: questDescription->[prisoner_nameDef] has been captured by enemy forces. It's up to you to rescue them.
You have defeated the prisoner camp!\n\nThe payment from [asker_faction_name] has arrived.

These soldiers participated in victorious rescue of [resolvedQuestName]. [asker_definite] wants to know who should receive the [royalFavorReward_amount] [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] for this service.
